title: Don't Burn My Stuff
description: Apply Fire Protection to every item to protect it from fire and lava
body:
Don't Burn My Stuff is a Minecraft mod for the fabric mod loader. It aims to make the Fire Protection enchantment a bit more useful. Features

It essentially does two things: 1. Makes every item enchantable with Fire Protection (Every means every. So also shears, saplings or dirt) 2. Items that are enchanted with Fire Protection don't burn in fire or lava anymore (like netherite)

Note: The level of the Fire Protection enchantment is irrelevant, even Fire Protection I protects stuff from high heat sources like lava. Fire Protection is still mutually exclusive to other Protection enchantments. So choose wisely.
